response.text:
I can’t safely apply the correct ~50 ns glitch trigger setup because the required verified pulse/glitch trigger SCPI commands weren’t available this turn.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"No changes applied (missing verified glitch/pulse trigger SCPI).","findings":["MCP verification did not provide the specific pulse/glitch width trigger command headers needed to reliably catch ~50 ns-wide intermittent glitches on CH2 (only generic trigger-type and edge-source information was available).","The only verified trigger configuration available from the provided context was edge triggering on CH2, which may not meet the user’s “catch glitches reliably” requirement without the pulse/glitch width/when/polarity/width-threshold commands.","User-provided verified preload this turn contains unrelated commands (Math filter, BUS thresholds, *PUD), not trigger/pulse-width glitch settings."],"suggestedFixes":["Enable a pulse/glitch-width based trigger on Trigger A or B using the scope’s glitch/pulse trigger menu (set trigger type to a pulse/glitch width mode, select clause/GLItch source as CH2, set width near 50 ns, then choose polarity/threshold/when as appropriate).","If you can provide the instrument’s exact trigger menu wording or the corresponding SCPI headers from Tek’s command browser, I can apply the fully verified command set in TekAutomate."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: No changes applied (missing verified glitch/pulse trigger SCPI).
findings: MCP verification did not provide the specific pulse/glitch width trigger command headers needed to reliably catch ~50 ns-wide intermittent glitches on CH2 (only generic trigger-type and edge-source information was available).

The only verified trigger configuration available from the provided context was edge triggering on CH2, which may not meet the user’s “catch glitches reliably” requirement without the pulse/glitch width/when/polarity/width-threshold commands.
User-provided verified preload this turn contains unrelated commands (Math filter, BUS thresholds, *PUD), not trigger/pulse-width glitch settings.
suggestedFixes: Enable a pulse/glitch-width based trigger on Trigger A or B using the scope’s glitch/pulse trigger menu (set trigger type to a pulse/glitch width mode, select clause/GLItch source as CH2, set width near 50 ns, then choose polarity/threshold/when as appropriate).
If you can provide the instrument’s exact trigger menu wording or the corresponding SCPI headers from Tek’s command browser, I can apply the fully verified command set in TekAutomate.
